targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(sensei_user_id) FROM sensei_users LIMIT 50

WITH daily_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC('day', joined_at) AS joined_date,
        COUNT(*) AS daily_count
    FROM sensei_users
    GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('day', joined_at)
),
running_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        joined_date,
        daily_count,
        SUM(daily_count) OVER (ORDER BY joined_date) AS running_total
    FROM daily_counts
)
SELECT date(joined_date) as join_date, running_total
FROM running_totals
WHERE joined_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '21 days'
ORDER BY joined_date;

SELECT 
    DATE(joined_at) AS join_date, 
    COUNT(*) AS new_users
FROM 
    sensei_users 
WHERE 
    joined_at >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days')  -- Ensures the oldest date is a full day
GROUP BY 
    DATE(joined_at)
ORDER BY 
    DATE(joined_at);

select 
	date(joined_at) as time,
	auth_type as metric,
	count(*) as value
from sensei_users
where joined_at >= now() - interval '14 days'
and auth_type is not null
group by time, metric
order by time, metric
select count(distinct sensei_user_id ) from subscriptions

select count(distinct sensei_user_id ) 
from subscriptions
where status in ('active', 'canceled')

SELECT
  date_trunc('day', event_timestamp) AS "time",
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'subscription_created')::bigint AS created,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'subscription_renewed')::bigint AS renewed,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'subscription_canceled')::bigint AS canceled,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'subscription_terminated')::bigint AS terminated
FROM events
WHERE event_timestamp >= '2025-12-02'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

WITH cohorts AS (
  SELECT
    sensei_user_id,
    date_trunc('month', joined_at) AS cohort_month
  FROM sensei_users
  WHERE joined_at IS NOT NULL
),
activity AS (
  -- Include signup month as guaranteed activity
  SELECT sensei_user_id, date_trunc('month', joined_at) AS active_month
  FROM sensei_users
  WHERE joined_at IS NOT NULL
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT
    e.sensei_user_id,
    date_trunc('month', e.event_timestamp) AS active_month
  FROM events e
  WHERE e.sensei_user_id IS NOT NULL
),
cohort_activity AS (
  SELECT
    c.cohort_month,
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM age(a.active_month, c.cohort_month))::int
      + EXTRACT(YEAR FROM age(a.active_month, c.cohort_month))::int * 12
      AS months_since_signup,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.sensei_user_id) AS active_users
  FROM cohorts c
  JOIN activity a USING (sensei_user_id)
  WHERE a.active_month >= c.cohort_month
  GROUP BY c.cohort_month, a.active_month
),
cohort_sizes AS (
  SELECT cohort_month, COUNT(*) AS cohort_size
  FROM cohorts
  GROUP BY cohort_month
)
SELECT
  to_char(ca.cohort_month, 'YYYY-MM') AS "Cohort",
  cs.cohort_size AS "Users",
  MAX(CASE WHEN months_since_signup = 0 THEN ROUND(100.0 * active_users / cohort_size, 2) END) AS "M0",
  MAX(CASE WHEN months_since_signup = 1 THEN ROUND(100.0 * active_users / cohort_size, 2) END) AS "M1",
  MAX(CASE WHEN months_since_signup = 2 THEN ROUND(100.0 * active_users / cohort_size, 2) END) AS "M2",
  MAX(CASE WHEN months_since_signup = 3 THEN ROUND(100.0 * active_users / cohort_size, 2) END) AS "M3",
  MAX(CASE WHEN months_since_signup = 4 THEN ROUND(100.0 * active_users / cohort_size, 2) END) AS "M4",
  MAX(CASE WHEN months_since_signup = 5 THEN ROUND(100.0 * active_users / cohort_size, 2) END) AS "M5",
  MAX(CASE WHEN months_since_signup = 6 THEN ROUND(100.0 * active_users / cohort_size, 2) END) AS "M6"
FROM cohort_activity ca
JOIN cohort_sizes cs USING (cohort_month)
WHERE months_since_signup <= 6
GROUP BY ca.cohort_month, cs.cohort_size
ORDER BY ca.cohort_month desc;

WITH cohorts AS (
  SELECT
    sensei_user_id,
    date_trunc('week', joined_at) AS cohort_week
  FROM sensei_users
  WHERE joined_at IS NOT NULL
),
activity AS (
  SELECT sensei_user_id, date_trunc('week', joined_at) AS active_week
  FROM sensei_users
  WHERE joined_at IS NOT NULL
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT
    e.sensei_user_id,
    date_trunc('week', e.event_timestamp) AS active_week
  FROM events e
  WHERE e.sensei_user_id IS NOT NULL
),
cohort_activity AS (
  SELECT
    c.cohort_week,
    (a.active_week::date - c.cohort_week::date) / 7 AS weeks_since_signup,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.sensei_user_id) AS active_users
  FROM cohorts c
  JOIN activity a USING (sensei_user_id)
  WHERE a.active_week >= c.cohort_week
  GROUP BY c.cohort_week, a.active_week
),
cohort_sizes AS (
  SELECT cohort_week, COUNT(*) AS cohort_size
  FROM cohorts
  GROUP BY cohort_week
),
now_week AS (
  SELECT date_trunc('week', now()) AS current_week
)
SELECT
  to_char(ca.cohort_week, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "Cohort",
  cs.cohort_size AS "Users",
  COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN weeks_since_signup = 0 THEN 100.0 * active_users / cohort_size END),
    CASE WHEN ca.cohort_week + interval '0 weeks' <= nw.current_week THEN 0 END) AS "W0",
  COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN weeks_since_signup = 1 THEN 100.0 * active_users / cohort_size END),
    CASE WHEN ca.cohort_week + interval '1 week' <= nw.current_week THEN 0 END) AS "W1",
  COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN weeks_since_signup = 2 THEN 100.0 * active_users / cohort_size END),
    CASE WHEN ca.cohort_week + interval '2 weeks' <= nw.current_week THEN 0 END) AS "W2",
  COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN weeks_since_signup = 3 THEN 100.0 * active_users / cohort_size END),
    CASE WHEN ca.cohort_week + interval '3 weeks' <= nw.current_week THEN 0 END) AS "W3",
  COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN weeks_since_signup = 4 THEN 100.0 * active_users / cohort_size END),
    CASE WHEN ca.cohort_week + interval '4 weeks' <= nw.current_week THEN 0 END) AS "W4",
  COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN weeks_since_signup = 5 THEN 100.0 * active_users / cohort_size END),
    CASE WHEN ca.cohort_week + interval '5 weeks' <= nw.current_week THEN 0 END) AS "W5",
  COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN weeks_since_signup = 6 THEN 100.0 * active_users / cohort_size END),
    CASE WHEN ca.cohort_week + interval '6 weeks' <= nw.current_week THEN 0 END) AS "W6",
  COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN weeks_since_signup = 7 THEN 100.0 * active_users / cohort_size END),
    CASE WHEN ca.cohort_week + interval '7 weeks' <= nw.current_week THEN 0 END) AS "W7",
  COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN weeks_since_signup = 8 THEN 100.0 * active_users / cohort_size END),
    CASE WHEN ca.cohort_week + interval '8 weeks' <= nw.current_week THEN 0 END) AS "W8",
  COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN weeks_since_signup = 9 THEN 100.0 * active_users / cohort_size END),
    CASE WHEN ca.cohort_week + interval '9 weeks' <= nw.current_week THEN 0 END) AS "W9",
  COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN weeks_since_signup = 10 THEN 100.0 * active_users / cohort_size END),
    CASE WHEN ca.cohort_week + interval '10 weeks' <= nw.current_week THEN 0 END) AS "W10",
  COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN weeks_since_signup = 11 THEN 100.0 * active_users / cohort_size END),
    CASE WHEN ca.cohort_week + interval '11 weeks' <= nw.current_week THEN 0 END) AS "W11",
  COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN weeks_since_signup = 12 THEN 100.0 * active_users / cohort_size END),
    CASE WHEN ca.cohort_week + interval '12 weeks' <= nw.current_week THEN 0 END) AS "W12"
FROM cohort_activity ca
JOIN cohort_sizes cs USING (cohort_week)
CROSS JOIN now_week nw
WHERE weeks_since_signup <= 12
GROUP BY ca.cohort_week, cs.cohort_size, nw.current_week
ORDER BY ca.cohort_week desc;

SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('hour', event_timestamp) AS hour,
    COUNT(DISTINCT sensei_user_id) AS distinct_users
FROM events 
WHERE event_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '504 hours'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('hour', event_timestamp)
ORDER BY distinct_users DESC;

WITH weekly_users AS (
    -- Get weekly new users and cumulative total users
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC('week', joined_at) AS event_week,
        COUNT(sensei_user_id) AS new_users,
        SUM(COUNT(sensei_user_id)) OVER (ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('week', joined_at)) AS total_users
    FROM 
        sensei_users
    GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('week', joined_at)
),
active_chess_players AS (
    -- Count unique users who played a game in a given event week after joining
    -- Only include games where date_added is close to game_date
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC('week', g.game_date) AS event_week,
        COUNT(DISTINCT g.sensei_user_id) AS active_users
    FROM 
        games g
    JOIN 
        sensei_users su ON g.sensei_user_id = su.sensei_user_id
    WHERE 
        su.joined_at <= g.game_date  -- Exclude games played before the user joined
        AND (g.date_added - g.game_date) <= interval '2 days'  -- Only include games added within 2 days of game_date
    GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('week', g.game_date)
),
previously_active_users AS (
    -- Identify users who had at least one event in any previous week
    SELECT 
        e.sensei_user_id,
        MIN(DATE_TRUNC('week', e.event_timestamp)) AS first_event_week
    FROM 
        events e
    GROUP BY 
        e.sensei_user_id
),
weekly_sensei_active_users AS (
    -- Count users who played a game in the current week AND had an event in the same week
    -- but also had an event in any previous week
    -- Only include games where date_added is close to game_date
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC('week', g.game_date) AS event_week,
        COUNT(DISTINCT g.sensei_user_id) AS sensei_active_users
    FROM 
        games g
    JOIN 
        events e ON g.sensei_user_id = e.sensei_user_id 
            AND DATE_TRUNC('week', g.game_date) = DATE_TRUNC('week', e.event_timestamp)  -- Same week
    JOIN 
        previously_active_users p ON g.sensei_user_id = p.sensei_user_id
            AND p.first_event_week < DATE_TRUNC('week', g.game_date)  -- Ensure they had an event in a previous week
    WHERE 
        (g.date_added - g.game_date) <= interval '2 days'  -- Only include games added within 2 days of game_date
    GROUP BY 
        DATE_TRUNC('week', g.game_date)
)
SELECT 
    date(wu.event_week) as event_week,
    wu.total_users,
    COALESCE(acp.active_users, 0) AS active_chess_players, -- Users who played games that week
    CASE 
        WHEN COALESCE(wu.total_users, 0) = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE ROUND((COALESCE(acp.active_users, 0)::DECIMAL / NULLIF(wu.total_users, 0)) * 100, 2)
    END AS chess_player_pct, -- % of total users who played a game      
    COALESCE(wsau.sensei_active_users, 0) AS active_sensei_users, -- Users who played chess that week and signed up to sensei chess in a prior week (not new users)
    CASE 
        WHEN COALESCE(acp.active_users, 0) = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE ROUND((COALESCE(wsau.sensei_active_users, 0)::DECIMAL / NULLIF(acp.active_users, 0)) * 100, 2)
    END AS sensei_engagement_percentage -- % of active chess players who are sensei active users
FROM 
    weekly_users wu
LEFT JOIN 
    active_chess_players acp ON wu.event_week = acp.event_week
LEFT JOIN 
    weekly_sensei_active_users wsau ON wu.event_week = wsau.event_week
WHERE 
    wu.event_week >= DATE '2025-01-01'
ORDER BY 
    wu.event_week desc;

WITH user_event_days AS (
    SELECT 
        sensei_user_id, 
        COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(event_timestamp)) AS event_days_count
    FROM events
    WHERE sensei_user_id > 2
    GROUP BY sensei_user_id
),
grouped_user_event_days AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN event_days_count >= 10 THEN '10+'
            ELSE event_days_count::TEXT
        END AS days_with_events,
        COUNT(*) AS user_count
    FROM user_event_days
    GROUP BY 
        CASE 
            WHEN event_days_count >= 10 THEN '10+'
            ELSE event_days_count::TEXT
        END
),
total_users AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_user_count FROM sensei_users
)
SELECT 
    g.days_with_events,
    g.user_count,
    ROUND(100.0 * g.user_count / t.total_user_count, 2) AS percentage_of_users
FROM grouped_user_event_days g
CROSS JOIN total_users t
ORDER BY 
    CASE 
        WHEN g.days_with_events = '10+' THEN 10
        ELSE g.days_with_events::INTEGER
    END;

WITH raw_hosts AS (
  SELECT
    -- strip off scheme + path, leaving host[:port]
    split_part(
      split_part(referer, '://', 2),
      '/', 
      1
    ) AS host
  FROM events
  WHERE event_type = 'page_load'
    AND event_timestamp >= now() - interval '7 days'
    AND event_data->>'page' = 'home'
    AND query_params = '{}'::jsonb
    AND referer IS NOT NULL
    AND referer <> 'null'
),
referrers AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM raw_hosts
  -- drop true blanks *and* any senseichess.com host (with optional port)
  WHERE host <> ''
    AND host !~* '^(.+\.)?senseichess\.com(:[0-9]+)?$'
)
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN host LIKE '%.%' THEN
      CASE
        -- country‐code TLD → keep last 3 labels
        WHEN char_length(regexp_replace(host, '^.*\.([^.]+)$', '\1')) = 2
        THEN substring(host FROM '([^.]+\.[^.]+\.[^.]+)$')
        -- generic TLD → keep last 2 labels
        ELSE substring(host FROM '([^.]+\.[^.]+)$')
      END
    ELSE
      host
  END AS referer,
  count(*) AS count
FROM referrers
GROUP BY referer
ORDER BY count DESC;

SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN (
      SELECT k
      FROM jsonb_object_keys(query_params) AS k
      LIMIT 1
    ) = 'referrer' THEN
      (SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text(query_params -> 'referrer') LIMIT 1)
    WHEN (
      SELECT k
      FROM jsonb_object_keys(query_params) AS k
      LIMIT 1
    ) = 'utm_source' THEN
      (SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text(query_params -> 'utm_source') LIMIT 1)
    ELSE (
      SELECT k
      FROM jsonb_object_keys(query_params) AS k
      LIMIT 1
    )
  END AS source, 
  count(*) as count
FROM events
WHERE event_timestamp >= now() - interval '7 days'
  AND query_params <> '{}'::jsonb
GROUP BY source
ORDER BY count DESC;

select 
event_timestamp, 
sensei_user_id, 
event_data->>'message' as message
from events 
where event_type = 'chat'
and event_timestamp >= now() - interval '7 days'
order by event_timestamp desc

select 
	date(event_timestamp) as time,
	event_type as metric,
	count(*) as value
from events
where event_timestamp >= now() - interval '14 days'
group by time, metric
order by time, metric

select count(*) from sensei_users
where sensei_user_id in (select sensei_user_id from account_links)

select count(distinct sensei_user_id) from account_links
where site = 'chesscom'

select count(distinct sensei_user_id) from account_links
where site = 'lichess'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS user_count
FROM (
    SELECT sensei_user_id
    FROM account_links
    WHERE site IN ('chesscom', 'lichess')
    GROUP BY sensei_user_id
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT site) = 2
) subquery;

select count(*) from sensei_users
where sensei_user_id not in (select sensei_user_id from account_links)

select count(*) from sensei_users
where sensei_user_id not in (select sensei_user_id from account_links)
and sensei_user_id in (select sensei_user_id from events where event_data->>'page' = 'profile')

panels.title: Users Without Account Links who visited the Profile Page

targets.rawSql:
select count(*) from sensei_users
where sensei_user_id not in (select sensei_user_id from account_links)
and sensei_user_id not in (select sensei_user_id from events where event_data->>'page' = 'profile')

panels.title: Users Without Account Links and never visited the Profile Page

targets.rawSql:
select
location->>'latitude' as latitude,
location->>'longitude' as longitude,
location->>'city' as city,
location->>'country_name' as country,
count(distinct sensei_user_id) as user_count
from events 
where sensei_user_id > 0
group by latitude, longitude, city, country

select
location->>'city' as city,
location->>'country_name' as country,
count(distinct sensei_user_id) as user_count
from events 
where sensei_user_id > 0
and location->>'country_name' != ''
group by city,country
order by user_count desc
SELECT COUNT(*) job_status from job_queue  where job_status = 'queued'
SELECT COUNT(*) job_status from job_queue  where job_status = 'processing'

SELECT COUNT(*) job_status from job_queue  
where job_status = 'failed'
and updated_at >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '24 hours')

SELECT COUNT(*) job_status from job_queue  
where job_status = 'completed'
and updated_at >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '24 hours')
SELECT COUNT(*) job_status from job_queue  where job_status = 'completed'

select 
job_type, 
count(*) filter (where job_status = 'queued') as queued,
count(*) filter (where job_status = 'processing') as processing,
count(*) filter (where job_status = 'completed') as completed,
count(*) filter (where job_status = 'failed') as failed
from job_queue 
where updated_at >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '24 hours')
group by job_type
order by job_type

SELECT 
  date_trunc('hour', updated_at) AS job_hour, 
  COUNT(*) AS job_count
FROM job_queue
WHERE job_status = 'failed'
and updated_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '96 hours'
GROUP BY job_hour
ORDER BY job_hour desc;
